# Yeti

> Make any browser your home — spatial bookmarks at the screen edge, command-bar search, and a pinned home station. Local-first library in IndexedDB; portable v2 YAML snapshots for dotfiles.

## Product

- Landing: /
- Home station (full UI): /home — pin this tab for daily work
- Start page (command bar): /start — bookmark as new-tab URL or use the optional browser extension

## Setup for developers

- Example config repo: https://github.com/jack-kitto/yeti-config
- Import a library snapshot from a raw GitHub URL in settings or via `:import`
- Claude skills in the example repo help import bookmarks from Chrome, Firefox, and Arc into v2 YAML
- Optional Chrome and Firefox extensions open /start on new tab (see main repo README)

## Source

- App repository: https://github.com/jack-kitto/yeti
- License and contribution: see repository README

## Not in scope (v1 / preview)

- Cloud library sync (planned paid tier)
- Live multi-device sync — use YAML snapshot export/import instead
